title: Bridge Essay: Beyond mindfulness: how Buddhist meditation transforms consciousness through distinct psychological pathways.
concept: Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, depersonalization, nondual awareness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, depersonalization, nondual awareness.

**Beyond mindfulness: how Buddhist meditation transforms consciousness through distinct psychological pathways.** - Front Psychol (2025). DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2025.1649564. PMID: 40831489. Buddhist meditation, encompassing practices such as Samatha (focused attention), Vipassana (open monitoring), and Metta (loving-kindness), offers unique pathways for transforming consciousness beyond conventional mindfulness. In this article, we review the studies that explore how these distinct meditative techniques systematically cultivate meta-cognitive insight, emotional regulation, and self-inquiry, facilitating profound shifts in awareness and personal growth.
